BloodForgedAxe.Name: Blood-Forged Axe
BloodForgedAxe.Description: A wicked axe stained crimson. On a critical hit, the wielder heals the amount of damage dealt.

FrostfangSpear.Name: Frostfang Spear
FrostfangSpear.Description: A spear imbued with the chilling essence of Jotunheim. On a successful attack, the target suffers 1 point of cold damage at the start of each round for the next d4 rounds.

ValkyriesBlade.Name: Valkyrie's Blade
ValkyriesBlade.Description: A finely crafted sword said to have been wielded by a Valkyrie. On a successful hit, the sword ignores the first point of armour.

DraugrClawKatar.Name: Draugr-Claw Katar
DraugrClawKatar.Description: A vicious weapon made from the claws of a Draugr. On a successful hit, the target is poisoned.

TrollSkullMace.Name: Troll-Skull Mace
TrollSkullMace.Description: A brutal mace fashioned from the skull of a troll. The wielder can reroll a failed attack once per session.

SerpentSpineWhip.Name: Serpent-Spine Whip
SerpentSpineWhip.Description: A whip woven from the spine of a giant serpent. Has a long reach and can be used to disarm or trip opponents, knocking them prone (Test Swift DR14).

RunicBow.Name: Runic Bow
RunicBow.Description: A simple wooden bow etched with runes of power. If the wielder scores a critical hit, the arrow pierces through the target and can hit another target behind it.

MuspelFireBrand.Name: Muspel-Fire Brand
MuspelFireBrand.Description: A sword forged in the fires of Muspelheim. On a successful hit, the target catches fire, taking d4 damage at the start of the next round.

KrakenTentacleFlail.Name: Kraken-Tentacle Flail
KrakenTentacleFlail.Description: A grotesque flail made from the severed tentacles of a kraken. On a successful hit, the target is unable to move next round.

WolfBoneDagger.Name: Wolf-Bone Dagger
WolfBoneDagger.Description: A small, sharp dagger carved from the bone of a dire wolf. Grants advantage on attacks made from stealth.

BerserkrsCleaver.Name: Berserkr's Cleaver
BerserkrsCleaver.Description: A massive two-handed axe. When the wielder takes damage, they can choose to enter a berserk rage, gaining +2 to attacks and damage but suffering a DR+4 defence for d4 rounds.

GiantsFemur.Name: Giant's Femur
GiantsFemur.Description: The femur of a deceased giant. Those who know, know.

SeaSerpentShield.Name: Sea Serpent Shield
SeaSerpentShield.Description: A shield fashioned from the scales of a sea serpent. If used to bash (d4 damage), the shield grants -2DR if the following action is a Parry.

DragonboneSpear.Name: Dragonbone Spear
DragonboneSpear.Description: A spear crafted from the bone of a slain dragon. On a critical hit, the spear bursts into flames, dealing an additional d6 fire damage.

CursedBearClawGauntlets.Name: Cursed Bear Claw Gauntlets
CursedBearClawGauntlets.Description: Gauntlets adorned with the claws of a cursed bear. When worn, gain +2 to Might Tests but suffer -2 to Wits Tests.

WightsHairNettle.Name: Wight's Hair Nettle
WightsHairNettle.Description: A whip woven from the hair of a vengeful wight. On a successful hit, the target is poisoned.

GiantsToeClub.Name: Giant's Toe Club
GiantsToeClub.Description: A crude club fashioned from the severed toe of a giant. When used to attack a defenceless creature or one begging for mercy, the attack deals double damage.

RunicWarHorn.Name: Runic War Horn
RunicWarHorn.Description: A horn carved with runes of power. When blown, all allies that hear it gain +1 to their attacks for the next round. Can also be used as an improvised weapon.

FlayedSkinDrum.Name: Flayed Skin Drum
FlayedSkinDrum.Description: A gruesome drum made of the flayed skin of a sacrificial victim. When played, it has a 50% chance of attracting a nearby wandering monster. If thrown, the drum deals d4 damage and makes a 'bonk' noise.

SkullTippedStaff.Name: Skull-Tipped Staff
SkullTippedStaff.Description: A staff topped with a human skull. Deals an additional d4 damage per skull added. The staff can only hold an additional three skulls.

WornLeatherJerkin.Name: Worn Leather Jerkin (Tier 2)
WornLeatherJerkin.Description: A weathered leather garment, softened by countless battles and travels.

FurLinedCloak.Name: Fur-Lined Cloak (Tier 2)
FurLinedCloak.Description: A warm cloak lined with thick furs, providing comfort and protection against the elements.

PaddedGambeson.Name: Padded Gambeson (Tier 2)
PaddedGambeson.Description: A quilted jacket, worn beneath armour or on its own, offering a layer of defence against blows.

StuddedLeatherCuirass.Name: Studded Leather Cuirass (Tier 3)
StuddedLeatherCuirass.Description: A hardened leather vest reinforced with metal studs, offering decent protection while maintaining mobility. Penalty: +2DR Swift Tests. Defence is DR14.

ChainmailHauberk.Name: Chainmail Hauberk (Tier 3)
ChainmailHauberk.Description: A shirt of interlocking metal rings, providing reliable defence against slashing attacks. Penalty: +2DR Swift Tests. Defence is DR14.

ScaleArmour.Name: Scale Armour (Tier 3)
ScaleArmour.Description: A flexible armour of overlapping metal scales, offering a balance of protection and agility. Penalty: +2DR Swift Tests. Defence is DR14.

LamellarCuirass.Name: Lamellar Cuirass (Tier 4)
LamellarCuirass.Description: A segmented cuirass of lacquered metal plates, meticulously arranged like protective scales. Penalty: +4DR Swift Tests. Defence is DR14.

PlateHauberk.Name: Plate Hauberk (Tier 4)
PlateHauberk.Description: A coat of overlapping iron plates, forged into a rigid shell that encases the wearer in steel. Penalty: +4DR Swift Tests. Defence is DR14.

Fehu.Name: Fehu (Wealth)
Fehu.Description: For the next d4 hours, your ability to discern valuable objects, both hidden and in plain sight, is heightened. Gain +2 to any Test involving Trinkets or valuables.

Uruz.Name: Uruz (Strength)
Uruz.Description: Channel the raw energy of Uruz, gaining or bestowing +2 to Might Tests for d6 rounds.

Thurisaz.Name: Thurisaz (Giant)
Thurisaz.Description: Unleash a shock wave from your weapon, knocking all enemies close to you prone and dealing d4 damage to each.

Ansuz.Name: Ansuz (Message)
Ansuz.Description: Invoke insight from the Norns to gain a truthful answer to a question or problem.

Raido.Name: Raido (Journey)
Raido.Description: Know the most direct path to your destination or summon a gate, without the need for a ritual, a totem or Test.

Kenaz.Name: Kenaz (Fire)
Kenaz.Description: Brand an enemy with Kenaz's Rune, causing them blindness and also making them glow brightly, making them visible through walls, darkness, or magical concealment. Attacks against the branded enemy are made with advantage.

Gebo.Name: Gebo (Gift)
Gebo.Description: Exchange life force. Heal an ally for d6HP at the cost of your own HP.

Wunjo.Name: Wunjo (Joy)
Wunjo.Description: Emit a joyful song that heals all nearby allies for d4HP and grants +1 to their next Test.

Hagalaz.Name: Hagalaz (Hail)
Hagalaz.Description: Call down a hailstorm, dealing d6 damage to all creatures in the area for d4 rounds. Surround yourself in raging hail for d4 rounds. Enemies that strike you take d4 damage from the freezing storm.

Isa.Name: Isa (Ice)
Isa.Description: Freeze your enemy in place. They are stunned for d2 rounds. Coat your weapon in frost for d4 rounds. Each strike deals an additional d4 cold damage.

Jera.Name: Jera (Harvest)
Jera.Description: Double the amount of your current food and water. Summon a bountiful harvest—you and your allies find d6 food and water within your immediate vicinity.

WrathOfMan.Name: Wrath of Man (Realm Special)
WrathOfMan.Description: If you deliver the final blow to an enemy you heal 1HP.

WyrdOfTheWolfSkin.Name: Wyrd of the Wolf-Skin
WyrdOfTheWolfSkin.Description: Once per day, enter a trance (d6 rounds): +2 to attacks and track by scent. Test Wits DR14 when ends or lash out at nearest being.

IronVigor.Name: Iron Vigor
IronVigor.Description: Drink enemy blood (1 round) to recover d6HP and double damage on next attack. Test Fortitude DR12 if tainted or suffer fever.

StormOfTheAesir.Name: Storm of the Aesir
StormOfTheAesir.Description: Once per battle after hit, deal additional d6 lightning damage.

OathToTheAncestors.Name: Oath to the Ancestors
OathToTheAncestors.Description: Once per session, reroll any failed attack or defence.

BerserkersToll.Name: Berserker's Toll
BerserkersToll.Description: For every 3HP lost, gain +1 to damage rolls for the remainder of battle.

BloodEagleRitual.Name: Blood Eagle Ritual
BloodEagleRitual.Description: Once per session (1 round): next attack hits automatically for max damage. Test Might DR14 at end of session or suffer -1 penalty to all rolls.

Flight.Name: Flight (Realm Special)
Flight.Description: You can fly. Roll d6 at end of round; on 1, must land for d4 rounds.

EyesOfTheFallen.Name: Eyes of the Fallen
EyesOfTheFallen.Description: Once per day, uncover creature weakness: +2 to attacks against it for the rest of battle.

WingsOfTheStorm.Name: Wings of the Storm
WingsOfTheStorm.Description: Once per day, fly for d6 rounds: attacks from above gain +2 bonus.

VoiceOfTheChooser.Name: Voice of the Chooser
VoiceOfTheChooser.Description: Once per battle, command an enemy (Test Fortitude DR14) to follow an order for 1 round.

SpearOfTheWorthy.Name: Spear of the Worthy
SpearOfTheWorthy.Description: Once per battle, negate an attack on an ally (Test Fortitude DR14).

RavensFavour.Name: Raven's Favour
RavensFavour.Description: Once per day, scout with ravens: advantage on next Test for group.

ValhallasCall.Name: Valhalla's Call
ValhallasCall.Description: Once per day, battle cry: allies gain +2 to attacks for d6 rounds.

NaturesLore.Name: Nature's Lore (Realm Special)
NaturesLore.Description: Add +1 HP to any healing amount.

NaturesWrath.Name: Nature's Wrath
NaturesWrath.Description: Once per day (Test Wits DR12): ensnare d3 enemies for d3 rounds (d3 damage/round, no movement).

NaturesShield.Name: Nature's Shield
NaturesShield.Description: Once per day, barkskin for d6 rounds: +2 to armour negation.

HealingWaters.Name: Healing Waters
HealingWaters.Description: Once per day, heal self or ally for d6+2HP and cleanse negative conditions.

BeastCompanion.Name: Beast Companion
BeastCompanion.Description: Loyal beast fights by your side. Wolf (6HP, d6), Hawk (4HP, d4), or Bear (8HP, d8).

VanirsBlessing.Name: Vanir's Blessing
VanirsBlessing.Description: Once per session, reroll any failed Test and sense nearby food/water/shelter.

VerdantRebirth.Name: Verdant Rebirth
VerdantRebirth.Description: Once per day (d6 rounds): allies gain +2 defence and regain 1HP at start of turn.

TitansMight.Name: Titan's Might
TitansMight.Description: Once per day, perform extraordinary feat of power (+d10 damage or massive lifting).

IcedAegis.Name: Iced Aegis
IcedAegis.Description: Once per session (d4 rounds): reduce damage by half and attackers take 1 freezing damage.

FrostboundGrasp.Name: Frostbound Grasp
FrostboundGrasp.Description: Once per day, stun foe for d2 rounds (living take d6 damage each round).

WintersFury.Name: Winter's Fury
WintersFury.Description: Once per day, exhale blizzard: d8 damage to all close enemies.

GlacialEmpowerment.Name: Glacial Empowerment
GlacialEmpowerment.Description: When on snow/ice, gain +2 to all Tests and leave icy patches.

YmirsRevival.Name: Ymir's Revival
YmirsRevival.Description: Once per lifetime at 0HP, encase in ice to delay death until thawed by Musphelheim fire.

DarkVision.Name: Dark Vision (Realm Special)
DarkVision.Description: You can see in the dark.

BlindingRadiance.Name: Blinding Radiance
BlindingRadiance.Description: Once per day, blind all nearby enemies for d3 rounds.

VeilOfLight.Name: Veil of Light
VeilOfLight.Description: Once per session (d6 rounds): shield ally for +2 defence and d4 healing. Draws simple enemies.

LuminousHealing.Name: Luminous Healing
LuminousHealing.Description: Once per day, heal self/ally for d6+2HP and remove negative conditions.

SunbeamStrike.Name: Sunbeam Strike
SunbeamStrike.Description: Once per battle (Test Guile DR12): deal d8 damage ignoring armour.

RadiantForm.Name: Radiant Form
RadiantForm.Description: Once per session (d3 rounds): +4 defence, move through objects/enemies (deal d4 damage ignoring armour).

BeaconOfHope.Name: Beacon of Hope
BeaconOfHope.Description: Once per day (d6 rounds): allies gain +2 to attack/defence and immunity to fear.

SmithsWill.Name: Smith's Will (Realm Special)
SmithsWill.Description: Discern value and craftsman of any weapon or armour.

RunicMastery.Name: Runic Mastery
RunicMastery.Description: Enhanced effects when inscribing Runes (e.g., d6 rounds/damage or d6 healing).

RunicReforging.Name: Runic Reforging
RunicReforging.Description: Reforge item to hold two Runes (synergy). Fumble causes double HP loss.

RuneOfShattering.Name: Rune of Shattering
RuneOfShattering.Description: One-use: max damage and weapon shatters dealing d6 shock wave damage.

SmithsResilience.Name: Smith's Resilience
SmithsResilience.Description: Gain +2 to Fortitude Tests and once per session negate a defence fumble.

AnvilBoundWill.Name: Anvil-Bound Will
AnvilBoundWill.Description: Once per session (Test Wits DR12): imbue weapon (+2 dmg, ignore armour) or armour (+2 negation) for next battle.

Quicksmith.Name: Quicksmith
Quicksmith.Description: Once per session, repair/upgrade item in 1 hour or swap inscribed Runes.

StenchOfDeath.Name: Stench of Death (Realm Special)
StenchOfDeath.Description: Smell death from up to a mile away.

MistyApparition.Name: Misty Apparition
MistyApparition.Description: Once per day (d3 rounds): become mist, immune to physical attacks and move through objects.

WailOfTheLost.Name: Wail of the Lost
WailOfTheLost.Description: Once per day, chilling scream: enemies gripped by fear run away for d3 rounds.

GhostlyStep.Name: Ghostly Step
GhostlyStep.Description: Once per day, automatically succeed on any stealth action.

SoulboundWeapon.Name: Soulbound Weapon
SoulboundWeapon.Description: Deals d8 damage (strikes incorporeal). Living take +d4 damage. Fumble releases trapped spirit.

MarkOfTheDead.Name: Mark of the Dead
MarkOfTheDead.Description: Once per battle (d6 rounds): DR to hit marked enemy reduced by 1 each round.

CommuneWithTheLost.Name: Commune with the Lost
CommuneWithTheLost.Description: Once per session, ask dead 3 questions (2 truths, 1 lie).

FireResistant.Name: Fire Resistant (Realm Special)
FireResistant.Description: Flame Constructs take half damage from fire attacks.

ImmolationAura.Name: Immolation Aura
ImmolationAura.Description: Once per day (d6 rounds): attackers take d4 fire damage and nearby materials ignite.

MoltenSurge.Name: Molten Surge
MoltenSurge.Description: Once per day, surge forward in lava: move through obstacles and deal d6 fire damage.

PyroclasticFist.Name: Pyroclastic Fist
PyroclasticFist.Description: Once per battle, attack with +3: deal d8 damage and knock target prone.

LivingFlame.Name: Living Flame
LivingFlame.Description: Once per day (d4 rounds): double damage dealt. Afterwards, -2 penalty to all Tests for rest of day.

EruptionCall.Name: Eruption Call
EruptionCall.Description: Once per day (d3 rounds): summon eruption dealing d6 damage per round.

InfernoHeart.Name: Inferno Heart
InfernoHeart.Description: For every 5 fire damage enemies take, gain +1 to all Tests until end of battle.

ChatWithAGoner.Name: Chat With a Goner (Realm Special)
ChatWithAGoner.Description: Talk to recently dead for up to one minute.

RequiemOfRest.Name: Requiem of Rest
RequiemOfRest.Description: Once per day (Test Swift DR12): lull nearby enemies into trance for d3 rounds.

SoulBinding.Name: Soul Binding
SoulBinding.Description: Bind soul of recently dead humanoid (Test Swift DR14). Commands scout/attack (d6 damage) for d6 hours.

HelsEmbrace.Name: Hel's Embrace
HelsEmbrace.Description: Once per day, drain d6HP from enemy on hit to heal yourself.

VeilOfDeath.Name: Veil of Death
VeilOfDeath.Description: Once per session (d4 rounds): make ally ghost-like. Enemies ignore them; cannot interact with physical world.

TheSpiritPath.Name: The Spirit Path
TheSpiritPath.Description: Summon spectral bridge (d6 hours). Crossers sacrifice d4HP or essence.

HelsBargain.Name: Hel's Bargain
HelsBargain.Description: Once in lifetime when ally dies: negotiate with Hel to revive them at grave cost.

SomeoneElsesMemories.Name: Someone Else's Memories (Realm Special)
SomeoneElsesMemories.Description: You have all the memories of all previous characters.

RuneStorm.Name: Rune Storm
RuneStorm.Description: Once per session (Test Wits DR14): deal d6 damage and cause random magical effects.

RuneExpertise.Name: Rune Expertise
RuneExpertise.Description: Gain +2 to Wits Tests when casting Runes.

TemporaryInscription.Name: Temporary Inscription
TemporaryInscription.Description: Once per day (Test Wits DR14): double Rune effect or fumble.

Realmstep.Name: Realmstep
Realmstep.Description: Once per day (Test Wits DR12): avoid an attack entirely by stepping into another realm.

WalkerOfWorlds.Name: Walker of Worlds
WalkerOfWorlds.Description: +2 bonus to all Tests for realm travel.

RiftWalker.Name: Rift Walker
RiftWalker.Description: Once per day, teleport self and one ally to a visible location.
